title: Leptosiphonium guppyi
taxonomy: Leptosiphonium guppyi is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is native to the island of New Guinea. Leptosiphonium guppyi is classified as an evergreen perennial herb with purple flowers. It belongs to the genus Leptosiphonium and is a relatively rare species. The classification of Leptosiphonium guppyi is primarily based on its botanical characteristics and genetic makeup.
